name: hexarelin
notes: Canonical one-letter backbone for His-D-2Me-Trp-Ala-Trp-D-Phe-Lys-NH2 (2-Me-D-Trp approximated as [DTR])

name: ipamorelin
notes: Approximate backbone for Aib-His-D-2-Nal-D-Phe-Lys-NH2 (Aib/2-Nal approximated as [AIB]/[DPN])

name: examorelin
notes: Synonym of hexarelin; backbone for His-D-2Me-Trp-Ala-Trp-D-Phe-Lys-NH2
